chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-149 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 24.09.2025 Mr. Pardeep Kumar B. Butani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Gul Bahar Magsi, DEO (Secondary), Larkano and Sanaullah Aghani, Deputy Director, Focal Person. ------ At the very outset, learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh files preliminary objections on behalf of Respondent No.3, taken on record, wherein respondent No.3 has categorically mentioned in para-6 in the following terms: 6. That neither the name of the petitioner is existing in the result of successful candidates announced by IQRA University nor the petitioner is qualifying the eligibility criteria of Drawing Teacher, as published in the newspapers. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh submits that the prayer so made is in respect of the recruitment process in the year 2004 and the petitioner has come to this Court in the year 2021; hence, the doctrine of laches is attracted, therefore, the petition on this score alone is also not maintainable. In support of his contentions, he has placed his reliance upon an esteemed Judgment dated 01.04.2015, penned down by learned Apex Court in Civil Petition No.186-K of 2013 (Re- Muhamad Arif and others v/s. Province of Sindh through Chief Secretary and others), taken on record. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner showed his inability to controvert the same. Accordingly and in view of the above legal position, the petition in hand has not only served its purpose, but also has become infructuous.

When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner showed his inability to controvert the same. Accordingly and in view of the above legal position, the petition in hand has not only served its purpose, but also has become infructuous. Consequently, the same is hereby dismissed having become infructuous. Judge Judge Manzoor
